sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. Values derived from official team materials and logo specifications.
description: The Edmonton Oilers are one of the most celebrated franchises in NHL history, founded in 1972 and based in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. They play at Rogers Place and compete in the Pacific Division of the Western Conference. The Oilers dominated the NHL in the 1980s, winning five Stanley Cup championships, largely fueled by the legendary Wayne Gretzky.
